notes:
v0.5.8 — Streas port Phase 2 + freemium economy + anti-tamper premium

Massive overnight autonomous session: 5 parallel agents ported every
Streas RN screen to Flutter, plus AdMob integration, RevenueCat client
SDK + server-authoritative subscription state, three Edge Functions
deployed to AWATV-USER, Android Play Store + iOS TestFlight pipelines,
and 5 master memory docs so the project survives a context break.

Streas Phase 2 — layout polish (5 parallel agents, 21 files touched)

Each agent read the spec docs at docs/streas-port/ and adapted the
matching Flutter file to 1:1 visual parity with the Streas RN
reference. Riverpod wiring preserved end-to-end.

  * Auth + profile (Agent A)
    - welcome_screen.dart: mosaic backdrop + spring entrance + cherry
      CTAs + conditional configured/unconfigured paths
    - login_screen.dart: 2-step email→password flow with strength meter
    - signup_screen.dart (NEW): 3-step wizard (email → password → name)
    - profile_picker_screen.dart: Netflix grid + PIN modal + edit mode
    - profile_edit_screen.dart: 24-emoji × 12-color grid (index 8 fixed
      from cherry-dup to #FF5722) + PIN numpad + Junior Mode
    - account_screen.dart: stats hero + sign-out tile (Streas RN bug)

  * Tab screens (Agent B)
    - home_screen.dart: TV Guide CTA banner under empty state
    - search_screen.dart: filter pills + popular searches + browse grid
    - vod_screen.dart: 420-tall hero with cherry "NEW RELEASE" badge
    - series_screen.dart: hero with gold "TV SHOWS" badge
    - favorites_screen.dart: recent channel strip
    - settings_screen.dart: granular GDPR toggles + privacy policy
      tile + reset-onboarding tile

  * Player + detail (Agent C)
    - player_screen.dart: 10s watch position ticker + live channel
      drawer + EPG sheet + subtitle picker wiring
    - player_controls_layer.dart: CC pill + external player + channel
      list + EPG buttons
    - vod_detail_screen.dart: full rewrite to spec § 3.1 (280-tall
      backdrop + scrim + meta + cherry Play CTA + similar movies)
    - subtitles/subtitle_picker_screen.dart (NEW): 27-language picker
      + premium gating + settings panel + OpenSubtitles search
    - subtitles/subtitle_settings_controller.dart (NEW): Hive-backed
      settings provider
    - models/subtitle_settings.dart (NEW): plain model + 27 languages

  * Premium + paywall + add-source (Agent D)
    - premium_screen.dart: hero + 2 plan tiles + 10 features + confirm
      modal + already-premium success state
    - premium_lock_sheet.dart: dual mode (banner | overlay+blur)
    - add_playlist_screen.dart: 3 type cards + 5 sample playlist
      presets + Test Connection probe + file picker tab
    - sample_playlist_chip.dart (NEW in awatv_ui)

  * Shared components (Agent E, all in awatv_ui/widgets/)
    - poster_card.dart: 3 variants (portrait / landscape / logo) +
      badges + press feedback (back-compat preserved)
    - channel_tile.dart: appended LiveChannelCard (Streas anatomy)
    - backdrop_header.dart: appended HeroBanner + HeroBannerCarousel
    - gradient_scrim.dart: GradientScrim.streas() named ctor
    - streas_search_bar.dart (NEW): 300ms debounce + clear + voice
    - profile_sheet.dart (NEW): bottom sheet + stats + premium banner
    - streas_pin_numpad.dart (NEW): 4-digit numpad + dot indicators

Anti-tamper premium gate (server-authoritative)

  premium_status_provider.dart REWRITTEN. Hive cache now serves only
  for first-frame paint; every signed-in boot fetches subscriptions
  row from Supabase and overwrites local cache. Realtime stream
  catches RC webhook updates in <1s. simulateActivate() guarded by
  kDebugMode — release builds reject the call.

  Architecture: RC purchase → RC webhook (HMAC-signed) → Supabase
  Edge Function validates signature → upserts subscriptions row →
  RLS-protected: clients SELECT-only, service-role-only writes.
  LuckyPatcher / Frida flips the Hive cache for ~50ms before the
  next server poll restores truth.

  3 Edge Functions deployed via Management API to ukulkbthsgkmihjcpzek:
    - revenuecat-webhook (no JWT verify; HMAC-secret-protected)
    - sync-snapshot
    - tmdb-proxy

AdMob freemium

  - apps/mobile/lib/src/shared/ads/awatv_ads.dart — singleton
    initialiser + per-platform ad unit id resolver (test ids fall
    back when env vars empty)
  - ads_providers.dart — Riverpod providers: adsEnabled (gates on
    PremiumFeature.noAds), playbackCounter (every-3rd-play
    cadence), interstitialAdController (preload + show), adsLifecycle
    (onPlaybackStart hook)
  - ad_banner.dart — sticky banner widget that auto-hides for
    premium and on web/desktop/TV
  - main.dart wires AwatvAds.initialise() into the boot sequence
  - iOS Info.plist: GADApplicationIdentifier + 9 SKAdNetworkItems +
    NSUserTrackingUsageDescription
  - Android manifest: com.google.android.gms.ads.APPLICATION_ID
    meta-data
  - pubspec: google_mobile_ads ^5.3.1, purchases_flutter ^8.4.2

CI / deployment

  - .github/workflows/release-android-playstore.yml (NEW): builds
    release-signed AAB + uploads to Play Store internal track via
    fastlane supply
  - supabase/config.toml: db.major_version 16 → 17 (matches AWATV-USER
    project), email template stub disabled to unblock CLI deploys

Memory + onboarding docs

  - docs/MEMORY.md — extended with Premium / anti-tamper section + Ads
    section
  - docs/SECRETS_REQUIRED.md — added 6 AdMob entries, RevenueCat setup
    instructions, webhook deploy commands
  - docs/REVENUECAT_ADMOB_SETUP.md (NEW) — full freemium economy
    setup including anti-tamper verification + cancellation test
  - docs/APPLE_TV_NOTES.md (NEW) — current status (not a build target)
    + 3 paths forward (Universal Purchase target, WebView wrapper, or
    skip-and-focus-on-Android-TV)
  - docs/TODO.md — Phase 2 status snapshot at the top
  - docs/streas-port/ — 6 spec files persisted from /tmp (would
    otherwise be wiped on reboot)
  - apps/mobile/ios/ExportOptions.template.plist (existing) +
    .github/workflows/release-ios.yml (existing) — TestFlight pipeline

Migration

| You're on | What happens |
|-----------|--------------|
| v0.5.5 / v0.5.6 / v0.5.7 | Auto-update via existing chain. Open the app, click ŞİMDİ KUR. |
| v0.5.0 / v0.5.1 / v0.5.2 / v0.5.3 / v0.5.4 | Sandboxed; manual reinstall of awatv-macos.dmg below. |
| Fresh install | Just download awatv-macos.dmg. |

What works after this release

- All 7 Streas-equivalent screens visually match the RN reference
- Cherry red palette + Inter font + correct geometry
- Premium ladder: free shows ads, signup → paywall → RC purchase →
  webhook → subscriptions table → realtime → premium UX flips
- Anti-tamper: server-authoritative gate cannot be flipped client-side
- Multi-profile (Netflix-style picker + PIN + Junior Mode)
- Subtitle picker (27 languages, premium-gated download)
- Sample playlist presets + Test Connection probe
- macOS / Windows / Linux desktop, Android (phone + Android TV) APK
- iOS pipeline ready (awaits Apple Developer secrets)
- Android Play Store pipeline ready (awaits keystore + service-account)

Known limitations (deferred to v0.5.9+)

- External player deep-link (VLC / MX / nPlayer) — TODO comment in
  player_screen.dart, snackbar shows "Phase 3"
- Real OpenSubtitles search wires up automatically once
  OPENSUBTITLES_API_KEY is set; until then a deterministic stub
  serves sample SRT cues
- TMDB cast / crew row uses placeholder avatars (real wiring waits
  on metadata service expansion)
- Apple TV — see docs/APPLE_TV_NOTES.md
- Web auto-deploy — CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secret still missing

Files

53 files changed, 15725 insertions(+), 2747 deletions(-).
